title: notifications-mail — field classification
description: MailSuppression entity fields classified. Email + bounce_reason are confidential (PII / near-PII); provider metadata + system flags are internal.

audit_log: audits.notifications-mail.* rows produced by MailSuppressionObserver + HasAuditable. Retained per foundation's audit_log tier rule.

notes: MailSuppression.email + email_domain are `confidential` (PII — email address). SHA-256 hash retained after 5y as anonymised evidence per retention.json.
bounce_reason may include recipient email fragments from provider responses. Sanitised before persistence (SanitiseBounceReasonCast).
No `restricted` fields — provider API keys live in Doppler, not in this table.
